allow: Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys.png 'Change the text on this book cover. Replace ASHWORTH at the top with DIE ASHWORTH DREI \(series title, smaller\). Keep the main title Das Licht im Badehaus in the center. Keep Band 1 below it. Add the author name C. J. Whitmore at the bottom of the cover. Keep everything else exactly the same - the Victorian bathhouse, the three children silhouettes, the golden light, the dark blue/purple atmosphere, the canal fog. Do not change the illustration style at all.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys.png 'Replace the text on this book cover while keeping the exact same illustration, atmosphere, and composition. Use elegant ornate golden fantasy-style lettering \(like the font style from classic mystery book covers\). The text should be: Top of cover in smaller elegant font: DIE ASHWORTH DREI. Center-bottom in large ornate golden letters: Das Licht im Badehaus. Below that in small text: Band 1. At the very bottom in a clean serif font: C. J. Whitmore. The text should have a slight golden glow effect matching the warm amber light from the bathhouse windows.'" --preview)

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys.png 'Replace the text on this book cover while keeping the exact same illustration, atmosphere, and composition. Use elegant ornate golden fantasy-style lettering \(like the font style from classic mystery book covers\). The text should be: Top of cover in smaller elegant font: DIE ASHWORTH DREI. Center-bottom in large ornate golden letters: Das Licht im Badehaus. Below that in small text: Band 1. At the very bottom in a clean serif font: C. J. Whitmore. The text should have a slight golden glow effect matching the warm amber light from the bathhouse windows.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys_1.png 'Extract only the text elements from this book cover on a transparent/black background. Keep the exact font styles, colors, and glow effects. I need: the DIE ASHWORTH DREI text at top, the Das Licht im Badehaus title, Band 1, and C. J. Whitmore at the bottom. Remove all illustration elements - keep only the typography on a plain dark background.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys.png 'Replace all text on this cover. Use ornate golden fantasy lettering. Top: DIE ASHWORTH DREI. Center-bottom large: Das Licht im Badehaus. Below: Band 1. Bottom: C. J. Whitmore. Keep the illustration unchanged.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/generate 'Book cover illustration in the style of classic British childrens mystery novels like Lemony Snicket. Scene: An atmospheric Victorian bathhouse at night, gothic architecture with ornate details, mysterious warm golden-amber light glowing from its arched windows. Three children \(ages 12-13\) seen from behind as silhouettes in the foreground, looking up at the bathhouse. Left: a tall lanky boy in an oversized wax jacket. Center: a girl with a long dark braid and oversized backpack. Right: a small slim boy with straight light-brown hair. Fog and mist creep over an old canal in the background, moonlit sky with deep blue-purple tones. The atmosphere is mysterious, inviting, slightly eerie but child-friendly. Elegant ornate golden fantasy-style title text with glow effect: DIE ASHWORTH DREI at top \(smaller\), Das Licht im Badehaus center-bottom \(large ornamental\), Band 1 below, C. J. Whitmore at very bottom in clean serif. Color palette: dark navy blue and deep purple night tones with warm gold amber light. Portrait format, book cover proportions 6:9'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys.png 'Replace all text on this book cover while keeping the illustration completely unchanged. Use elegant ornate golden fantasy-style lettering with a subtle glow effect. Text layout: Top in smaller elegant font: DIE ASHWORTH DREI. Center-bottom in large ornate golden letters: Das Licht im Badehaus. Below that in small text: Band 1. At the very bottom in a clean serif font: C. J. Whitmore.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_for_a_middlegrade_mys_1.png 'Extract only the text elements from this cover onto a plain black background. Keep the exact same golden ornate font styles and glow effects. I need: DIE ASHWORTH DREI, Das Licht im Badehaus, Band 1, and C. J. Whitmore. Remove all illustration, keep only typography.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/generate 'Book cover for a middle-grade mystery novel. Portrait format, book cover proportions 6:9. Style: atmospheric British childrens book illustration, slightly dark but child-friendly, classic mystery genre like Lemony Snicket. BUILDING: A weathered Victorian-era BATHHOUSE beside an old canal at night. This is NOT a house - it is a former public bathhouse, a utilitarian civic building repurposed and abandoned. Key architectural features: large bricked-up arched windows \(distinctive rounded Victorian arches, some sealed with mismatched brick\), industrial chimney or ventilation stack, flat or low-pitched roof with missing slates, thick institutional walls with remnants of old signage or tiling visible. The building has an odd, asymmetric look - clearly modified and rebuilt over decades. Some sections look older than others. Heavy decay: crumbling mortar, water stains, moss, ivy creeping up one side, a partially collapsed section. One or two windows NOT bricked up, with a mysterious warm golden-amber light glowing from inside - punctual and eerie, like someone lit a lantern where no one should be. The light should be the visual focal point - bright and specific against the dark ruin. CANAL: The old canal is clearly visible in the foreground or beside the building, with dark still water reflecting the golden light. A towpath runs along it. The canal is integral to the scene, not decoration. THREE CHILDREN in the foreground, seen from behind, slightly to one side so the building is clearly visible. They are investigating, not just looking: Left: JUDE, 13, tall and lanky, wearing an oversized wax jacket that is too big for him \(it was his fathers\), messy dark-blond hair sticking up. He leans forward slightly, alert, noticing something. Center: PRIYA, 13, compact and energetic, long black hair in a practical braid, oversized backpack on her back. She stands confidently, perhaps pointing or gesturing. Right: ARCHIE, 12, noticeably smaller and thinner than the others, straight light-brown hair over his ears, wearing dark clothes and black sneakers. He hangs back slightly from the other two, observing from a half-step behind, sketchbook visible in his hand or tucked under his arm - the watcher of the group. COMPOSITION: Leave breathing room between the title text and the figures. The building and light should dominate the upper two-thirds. Children in the lower third. Canal visible. TEXT: Elegant ornate golden fantasy lettering with subtle warm glow. DIE ASHWORTH DREI at very top, small and elegant. Das Licht im Badehaus below center, large but not so large it covers the figures - leave space. Band 1 small below title. C. J. Whitmore at very bottom in clean serif. COLOR: Dark navy blue and deep purple night sky, warm gold amber light from building windows, muted greens and browns on the decay.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/generate 'Book cover ILLUSTRATION ONLY - NO TEXT whatsoever on the image. No title, no author name, no text of any kind. Portrait format, book cover proportions 6:9. Style: atmospheric British childrens book illustration, slightly dark but child-friendly, classic mystery genre like Lemony Snicket. BUILDING: An abandoned Victorian-era PUBLIC BATHHOUSE - a squat, heavy, ASYMMETRIC industrial civic building. Old British municipal architecture: thick brick walls, a low flat roof with a stubby ventilation chimney, wide arched entrances now sealed shut. The facade is IRREGULAR - different sections added at different times, parts dont match. Some walls older dark brick, others patched with lighter stone. Several large arched windows BRICKED UP with mismatched brick. One small window on an upper floor has mysterious warm golden light glowing from inside. Remnants of old ceramic tiles or faded signage on exterior. Heavy decay: collapsed section on one side, missing roof slates, thick ivy, water damage stains, rusted iron railings. Building sits RIGHT ON the canal edge. CANAL: Dark still water in foreground reflecting golden light. Worn stone towpath between viewer and building. Fog creeps low over water. THREE CHILDREN on towpath, seen from behind, positioned in lower third. Left: JUDE, 13, tall lanky, oversized wax jacket with taped elbow patches, messy dark-blond hair, leaning forward peering at building. Center: PRIYA, 13, compact build, long black hair in practical braid, big overstuffed backpack, standing steady and alert. Right: ARCHIE, 12, noticeably smaller and thinner, straight light-brown hair over ears, dark clothes, black Chuck Taylor sneakers, hangs back a half-step, sketchbook under arm, observing quietly. COMPOSITION: Building fills upper two-thirds. Children small in lower third on towpath. Leave clear space at top and bottom edges for text to be added later. NO TEXT ON THE IMAGE. COLOR: Dark navy deep purple sky, warm gold amber light, muted greens browns on decay, dark water with golden reflections.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/edit nanobanana-output/book_cover_illustration_only_no_.png 'Add text to this book cover illustration. Use elegant ornate golden fantasy-style lettering with a subtle warm glow effect. Place the text as follows: At the very top: DIE ASHWORTH DREI in small elegant golden letters. In the lower portion below the children: Das Licht im Badehaus in large ornate golden letters. Below that in small text: Band 1. At the very bottom: C. J. Whitmore in a clean golden serif font. The golden text should complement the warm amber light in the illustration. Do not change the illustration at all.'")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/generate 'Book cover WITH TEXT for a middle-grade mystery novel. Portrait format, 6:9 proportions. Style: atmospheric British childrens book illustration, dark but child-friendly, Lemony Snicket mystery genre. SCENE: An abandoned Victorian-era public bathhouse at night - a squat heavy ASYMMETRIC industrial brick building sitting right on a canal edge. The facade is irregular with different sections added at different times. Several large arched windows and doorways are BRICKED UP. Old faded remnants of BATH HOUSE lettering on the brick. One single window on an upper floor glows with warm golden-amber light - the focal point. Heavy decay everywhere: partially collapsed roof section, missing slates, thick ivy growing up the walls, water stains, rusted iron railings, crumbling mortar. A stubby chimney or ventilation stack on the roof. CANAL with dark still water in the foreground, golden light reflected in it. Fog creeps low over the water surface. Stone towpath between viewer and building. THREE CHILDREN on the towpath seen from behind: Left JUDE 13 tall lanky oversized wax jacket messy dark-blond hair leaning forward. Center PRIYA 13 compact long black braid big backpack standing alert. Right ARCHIE 12 smaller thinner light-brown hair dark clothes hanging back a half-step with sketchbook observing quietly. TEXT LAYOUT: DIE ASHWORTH DREI at very top in small elegant golden letters with subtle glow. The building dominates the middle - keep it clear of text. Das Licht im Badehaus in large ornate golden fantasy lettering with warm glow placed in the lower portion below the children. Band 1 in small text directly below. C. J. Whitmore at very bottom in clean golden serif font. Each text element appears EXACTLY ONCE. The golden text complements the warm amber light in the illustration. COLOR: Dark navy purple sky, warm gold amber light, muted greens browns decay, dark reflective water.'")
